_comment: Shared Splunk Platform version defaults and compatibility metadata. Defaults target 10.4; older Enterprise and Cloud trains remain supported.

upgrade_notes_10_4.kvstore_mongodb: Enterprise 10.4 removes MongoDB 4-6 binaries. Upgrade 9.x to 10.0 or 10.2 before 10.4. On 10.x, MongoDB 8 is applied automatically during upgrade.
upgrade_notes_10_4.tls: Enterprise 10.4 removes TLS 1.0 and 1.1 negotiation between Splunk components. Use TLS 1.2 or higher.
upgrade_notes_10_4.config_validation: Enterprise 10.4 introduces Config Validation for .conf changes before production impact.
upgrade_notes_10_4.enterprise_no_10_3_train: There is no Splunk Enterprise 10.3 release train; Cloud 10.3.x stacks are Cloud-only.
